title: Rename Tools
description: This resource pack adds renames to: flint and steel, netherite hoe, netherite pickaxe, netherite shovel, netherite sword.
body:
This renames the tools to different textures. The listed textures are in gallery. LIST OF RENAMES:
- Iron And Flint
- Glass Pickaxe
- Glass Pickaxe Fortune
- Fire Sword
- Darkness Shovel
- Darkness Shovel Fortune
- Fantasy Hoe
- Fantasy Hoe Fortune
- Fire Bow
- Fire Crossbow
- Fire Spear
- Netherite Battleaxe
- Netherite Battleaxe Fortune
- Orange Battleaxe
- Orange Battleaxe Fortune
- Golden Mace

(my first file does say AAAIL TOOLS but that was my old name for it.)
